name: Springtime Garden Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan combine water, margarine, instant chicken bouillon, salt, pepper, and minced garlic. Bring to a full boil.
2. Add rice and carrots; return to a full boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer until rice is tender (25-30 minutes).
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: toasted slivered almonds, fresh chopped parsley, and sliced green onions.
